Revenue Strategy · Pricing · Commercial Excellence

Nthabiseng

Mohatli

Pricing Manager & Revenue Strategy Expert

11 years driving multimillion-dollar revenue growth across global financial institutions through strategic pricing, analytics, and executive stakeholder engagements.

Download Executive CV Download VA CV Contact
Experience at
Mastercard Absa FNB Zurich Insurance
Summary
"Turning data complexity into strategic clarity — and strategic clarity into measurable revenue."

Nthabiseng Mohatli is a senior pricing and revenue strategy leader with more than a decade of experience driving commercial growth for leading global financial institutions. Operating at the intersection of analytics, commercial strategy, and executive stakeholder engagement, she has built a distinguished career delivering sustainable revenue growth across Africa, EEMEA, and global markets.

At Mastercard, Nthabiseng progressed from Senior Pricing Specialist to Global Pricing Manager, reflecting a consistent track record of high performance and leadership. In these roles, she led complex, multi-market pricing programmes, served as Secretary to the Global Core Payments Pricing Committee, and played a pivotal role in helping secure a landmark 10-year strategic agreement for the East Africa region. She also led commercial pricing strategies and RFP submissions for major South African financial institutions, helping secure high-value partnerships. Through disciplined pricing optimisation and strategic commercial execution, her work consistently delivered 3–5% incremental year-on-year net revenue growth across some of the world’s most dynamic and competitive payments markets.

Before joining Mastercard, she developed deep expertise in quantitative analytics and financial strategy. At Absa, she specialised in enterprise credit risk modelling, building sophisticated analytical models to support credit risk management and business decision-making. At FNB, she led pricing strategy across the Merchant Services and Foreign Exchange product portfolios, where she presented annual pricing recommendations directly to executive leadership, including the CEO and CFO. She began her career in Zurich Insurance’s actuarial graduate programme, establishing a strong foundation in statistical modelling, financial analysis, and data-driven decision-making.

Known for combining analytical rigour with commercial acumen, Nthabiseng translates complex data into clear strategic decisions that drive measurable business outcomes. She is equally effective shaping executive-level commercial strategy as she is developing the analytical frameworks that underpin it. Her ability to bridge technical expertise with business leadership has made her a trusted advisor to senior executives and a respected leader in pricing, revenue strategy, and commercial transformation.

Featured Projects

Strategic Initiatives

Mastercard · Regulatory Compliance
Ghana Payment Localisation — Core Fee Regulatory Alignment
Business Challenge

The Bank of Ghana’s regulatory requirements mandated the localisation of core payment processing fees, requiring a comprehensive review and restructuring of existing pricing frameworks across the market.

Role & Contribution

Led the pricing workstream for regulatory compliance, redesigning the fee structure to meet Bank of Ghana requirements while preserving commercial viability and ensuring stakeholder alignment across product, legal, and regional teams.

Business Impact

Successfully implemented a compliant local pricing structure, ensuring Mastercard’s continued market presence and uninterrupted commercial operations in Ghana within the required regulatory timelines.

Regulatory Pricing Compliance Stakeholder Management Financial Modelling
Mastercard · Market Restructuring
Nigeria Disintermediation — Processing Transaction Restructuring
Business Challenge

The Central Bank of Nigeria’s disintermediation directives required the restructuring of payment transaction flows, creating significant commercial and pricing implications across Mastercard’s Nigeria portfolio.

Role & Contribution

Developed and implemented a pricing strategy for the restructured transaction model, partnering with product, legal, and commercial teams to ensure revenue continuity and regulatory compliance throughout the transition.

Business Impact

Maintained revenue continuity during a complex market transition while ensuring full compliance with the Central Bank of Nigeria’s disintermediation requirements.

Pricing Strategy Revenue Management Regulatory Compliance Cross-functional Leadership
Mastercard · Commercial Strategy
Equity Bank Kenya — Deal Commercialisation RFP
Business Challenge

A strategic RFP from Equity Bank Kenya required a compelling and commercially competitive pricing response to secure a significant banking partnership in one of East Africa’s most competitive markets.

Role & Contribution

Led the pricing commercialisation workstream for the RFP response, developing a competitive pricing proposal that balanced commercial attractiveness with revenue protection — collaborating closely with account management, product, and legal teams.

Business Impact

Developed a winning commercial pricing strategy that supported Mastercard’s RFP objectives, strengthening the East Africa commercial pipeline.

Deal Commercialisation RFP Management Commercial Negotiations Financial Modelling
Mastercard · Revenue Growth
EEMEA & Global Revenue Acceleration — Pricing Contribution
Business Challenge

Mastercard’s EEMEA and global divisions required sustained year-on-year pricing revenue growth across a complex portfolio of payment products and markets, with direct accountability to the division P&L.

Role & Contribution

Led the pricing contribution to the revenue acceleration programme — developing and implementing pricing initiatives across core payments, tracking actual pricing revenue, and updating the division P&L with real-time performance data.

Business Impact

Delivered 3–5% incremental pricing revenue year-on-year across EEMEA and global markets, contributing directly to Mastercard’s sustained revenue growth targets.

Revenue Strategy P&L Management Pricing Analytics Python · SQL
Mastercard · Pricing Strategy
Customer Economics & Pricing Optimisation — International Low Value Payments
Business Challenge

International low value payment transactions — including recurring subscription billing from merchants such as Netflix, Spotify, and Amazon Prime — required a refined pricing approach that balanced customer economics with sustainable revenue growth.

Role & Contribution

Led the pricing optimisation workstream for international low value payments, analysing customer economics across subscription and recurring-billing merchant segments to inform competitive, revenue-conscious pricing recommendations.

Business Impact

Delivered pricing recommendations that supported sustainable revenue growth across the international low value payments portfolio while maintaining competitive positioning for key subscription merchants.

Customer Economics Pricing Strategy Low Value Payments Financial Modelling
FNB · Process Innovation
Pricing Process Automation — SharePoint Approval Platform
Business Challenge

The existing pricing approval process relied on manual, email-based workflows — creating significant delays, audit risk, and operational inefficiency across the global pricing team.

Role & Contribution

Designed and implemented an automated SharePoint-based pricing approval platform that replaced manual email processes with an algorithm capable of pre-approving pricing proposals against predetermined pricing rules — a process redesign spanning technical build, stakeholder alignment, and change management.

Business Impact

Eliminated manual approval bottlenecks, reduced turnaround time significantly, and established an auditable, scalable pricing governance process across the global team.

Process Automation SharePoint Business Analysis Governance Design
Mastercard & FNB · Governance
Pricing Governance and Policy Development
Business Challenge

The global core payments pricing team lacked a formal governance structure and pricing policy framework, creating inconsistency in pricing decisions and accountability gaps across regions.

Role & Contribution

Led the design and implementation of a global pricing governance framework — establishing the pricing committee structure, policy documentation, decision rights, and escalation protocols. Served as secretary to the global pricing committee, managing agenda, minutes, and action tracking across senior stakeholders from Product, Finance, Legal, and Public Policy.

Business Impact

Established a consistent, accountable global pricing governance structure that improved decision quality and cross-regional alignment in pricing strategy.

Governance Design Policy Development Executive Facilitation Stakeholder Management
Absa CIB · Credit Risk Analytics
Model Validation for ECL, LGD, PD and EAD
Business Challenge

Enterprise credit risk models — Expected Credit Loss (ECL), Loss Given Default (LGD), Probability of Default (PD), and Exposure at Default (EAD) — required rigorous, IFRS 9-compliant validation to support reliable credit risk decision-making across the Corporate & Investment Bank portfolio.

Role & Contribution

Performed model validation across ECL, LGD, PD, and EAD forecasting models, applying IFRS 9-compliant predictive modelling to assess model accuracy and identify customers at risk of stage migration.

Business Impact

Strengthened confidence in credit risk model outputs, supporting more accurate budget planning, forecasting, and regulatory reporting across the CIB portfolio.

Model Validation IFRS 9 Credit Risk Analytics Python · SAS
FNB Acquiring
Data Enrichment for Attrition & Retention Models
Business Challenge

Existing attrition and retention models lacked sufficient data enrichment, limiting predictive accuracy and reducing the effectiveness of strategic credit risk decisions across the card acquiring portfolio.

Role & Contribution

Led a data enrichment initiative to enhance model inputs, improving the quality and completeness of data feeding into attrition and retention analytical models across the acquiring portfolio.

Business Impact

Improved the predictive capability of retention models, enabling more targeted and evidence-based credit risk management decisions across the portfolio.

Data Analytics Predictive Modelling Credit Risk Python · SAS
FNB · Strategic Pricing
Annual Pricing Reviews — Card Acquiring & Foreign Exchange
Business Challenge

FNB’s Merchant Services and Foreign Exchange portfolios required structured annual pricing reviews that balanced revenue growth, competitive positioning, and regulatory compliance — with sign-off required at the highest executive level.

Role & Contribution

Led end-to-end annual pricing reviews across card acquiring and FX portfolios — building pricing models, conducting market analysis, preparing executive presentations, and facilitating review sessions with the CEO and CFO. Managed implementation timelines and ensured all pricing changes took effect before the regulatory effective date.

Business Impact

Delivered successfully implemented annual pricing structures that maintained commercial competitiveness, supported revenue budgets, and met all regulatory requirements on schedule.

Executive Pricing Reviews Financial Modelling C-Suite Communication Revenue Forecasting
Leadership Philosophy
"Sustainable growth is built on rigorous analysis, clear strategy, and the courage to lead decisions with evidence rather than assumption."

I believe that the most impactful commercial decisions are made at the intersection of precise data and strategic courage. Data without direction is noise. Strategy without evidence is risk. My role has always been to bring both together — building the analytical frameworks that enable organisations to make decisions with confidence, and the governance structures that ensure those decisions are made consistently.

I approach every challenge as an opportunity to create lasting value — not just short-term results. Whether leading a multi-market pricing programme, redesigning a governance process, or developing a commercial response to a strategic RFP, my focus is always on building solutions that outlast the immediate objective.

Data-Driven Decisions
Every commercial recommendation I make is grounded in rigorous analysis. I build the models, validate the assumptions, and present the evidence — so decisions are made with clarity rather than guesswork.
Collaborative Leadership
The best pricing strategies are co-created — with product teams, country managers, legal partners, and commercial leads. I lead through influence, not authority, building alignment across complex stakeholder environments.
Long-Term Value Creation
I design systems, processes, and frameworks that continue to deliver value long after the initial initiative. Scalable governance, automated workflows, and reproducible analytical tools are the foundations of durable commercial success.
Entrepreneurship

Property Investment & Student Accommodation · 2019 – Present
